context:
Beads description:
Add @zumer/snapdom package for DOM-to-image capture.

## Steps
1. Run: pnpm add @zumer/snapdom
2. Verify TypeScript types are available
3. Test basic capture in browser dev tools

## Reference
snapdom is used in the reference script to capture DOM elements as PNG images:
```ts
import { snapdom } from '@zumer/snapdom';
const snap = await snapdom(element);
const img = await snap.toPng();
```

## Acceptance Criteria
- Package installed and importable
- Types working in IDE
- Basic test confirms capture works
